description: TuneOps org-level Renovate preset. Encodes the policy from tuneops-docs/workspace/design/RENOVATE_POLICY.md (Phase 0 decisions D1-D3) and the versioning tiers from tuneops-workspace/.claude/rules/versioning-policy.md (F-09cb6). Consumed by every tuneops-ai repo via `extends: ["github>tuneops-ai/.github:renovate-config"]`. Upgraded 2026-06-02 from the CHORE-493c2 minimal config to full Phase C policy.

packageRules.description: Phase C Stage 1 — Dashboard mode. Every detected update lands as a checkbox on the Dependency Dashboard issue first. PRs only open when the box is checked. To flip a repo to PR mode (Stage 2), override `dependencyDashboardApproval: false` in that repo's renovate.json.
Security advisories — auto-merge regardless of update type, off-schedule. CVE response time matters more than review cadence.
External (non-TuneOps) patch + pin + digest updates — auto-merge when CI green per RENOVATE_POLICY.md D2.
TuneOps internal pre-release libraries (-alpha.N / -beta.N) — always manual per F-09cb6. CRD/wire-contract repos where 'patch' can mean schema-field-semantics-changed.
TuneOps internal plain pre-1.0 libraries — manual initially. Promote to automerge-patch only after 2 weeks of green Renovate PRs per RENOVATE_POLICY.md D2.
Minor and major updates — always human review regardless of source.
